    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR"><head>
    <meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
    <title>Hub de Oportunidades Institucionais</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <style>:root{--canvas:#f4f6fb;--surface:#fff;--surface2:#f8fafc;--line:#e6eaf2;--line2:#eef1f7;--ink:#0f1b34;--ink2:#46546f;--ink3:#8a96ac;--primary:#1b3a8f;--primary2:#2f5bd6;--psoft:#eaf0ff;--green:#13a36b;--gsoft:#e3f7ee;--orange:#e8801f;--osoft:#fdeede;--purple:#7c4dd0;--pusoft:#f0e9fb;--red:#dc3a4b;--rsoft:#fde6e8;--cyan:#0fa3b1;--csoft:#e0f6f8;--radius:14px;--sh-sm:0 1px 3px rgba(15,27,52,.07);--sh:0 6px 22px rgba(15,27,52,.08);--sh-lg:0 18px 50px rgba(15,27,52,.16);--sb:264px;--tb:66px;font-family:'Inter',system-ui,Segoe UI,sans-serif}
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}html,body{height:100%}body{background:var(--canvas);color:var(--ink);font-size:14px;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:10px;height:10px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#d4dae6;border-radius:20px;border:3px solid var(--canvas)}
    .shell{display:flex;min-height:100vh}
    .sidebar{width:var(--sb);flex:0 0 var(--sb);background:linear-gradient(185deg,#101c38,#0c1730);color:#cfd8ec;position:sticky;top:0;height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:18px 14px}
    .brand{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:6px 8px 18px}.brand .mk{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary2),var(--purple));color:#fff;font-weight:800;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(47,91,214,.4)}
    .brand b{display:block;font-size:14.5px;color:#fff;line-height:1.1}.brand span{font-size:11.5px;color:#7f8db0}
    .nav{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;margin-top:4px}.nav .grp{font-size:10.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:#5e6c92;padding:14px 12px 6px;font-weight:700}
    .nav a{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;color:#aeb9d6;font-weight:500;font-size:13.3px;transition:.15s;position:relative;cursor:pointer}.nav a:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#fff}.nav a .ic{width:20px;text-align:center;font-size:15px;opacity:.9}
    .nav a.on{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(47,91,214,.32),rgba(124,77,208,.12));color:#fff}.nav a.on::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:3px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--primary2)}
    .nav a .tag{margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;padding:1px 7px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.13);color:#dfe6f7}
    .sbf{padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)}.pulse{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}.pulse b{display:block;font-size:12.5px;color:#fff}.pulse span{font-size:11px;color:#8a97ba}
    .main{flex:1;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
    .topbar{height:var(--tb);background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:0 24px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:30}
    .search{flex:1;max-width:520px;position:relative}.search input{width:100%;height:40px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface2);border-radius:10px;padding:0 14px 0 38px;font-size:13.5px;outline:none}
    .search input:focus{border-color:var(--primary2);background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--psoft)}.search .si{position:absolute;left:13px;top:11px;color:var(--ink3);font-size:15px}
    .tba{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-left:auto}.ib{width:40px;height:40px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface);border-radius:10px;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink2);display:grid;place-items:center;position:relative}.ib:hover{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--primary)}
    .bdot{position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:20px;min-width:17px;height:17px;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:0 4px}
    .uc{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:5px 8px 5px 5px;border-radius:12px}.av{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary),var(--purple));color:#fff;font-weight:700;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:13px}.uc b{display:block;font-size:13px;line-height:1.1}.uc span{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3)}
    .view{padding:26px 28px 60px;max-width:1660px;width:100%;margin:0 auto;animation:fade .25s ease}@keyframes fade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    .ph{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:16px;margin-bottom:22px;flex-wrap:wrap}.ph h1{font-size:23px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.4px}.ph p{color:var(--ink2);font-size:13.5px;margin-top:3px;max-width:760px}.ph .sp{flex:1}
    .grid{display:grid;gap:18px}.g2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.g3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.g4{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
    @media(max-width:1380px){.g4{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}@media(max-width:880px){.g2,.g3,.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
    .card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}.ch{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2)}.ch h3{font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700}.ch .sp{flex:1}.cb{padding:18px}
    .muted{color:var(--ink3)}.sm{font-size:12px}.mt{margin-top:18px}.center{text-align:center}
    .kpi{padding:18px;border-radius:var(--radius);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);position:relative;overflow:hidden}.kpi::after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-30px;top:-30px;width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;opacity:.12;background:var(--ac,var(--primary2))}
    .kpi .ki{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:18px;background:var(--so,var(--psoft));color:var(--ac,var(--primary2));margin-bottom:12px}
    .kpi .kv{font-size:27px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.6px;line-height:1}.kpi .kl{color:var(--ink2);font-size:12.5px;margin-top:6px}.kpi .kt{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;margin-top:8px;display:inline-flex;gap:4px;align-items:center}.up{color:var(--green)}.down{color:var(--red)}
    .bg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:30px;line-height:1.4;white-space:nowrap}
    .b-blue{background:var(--psoft);color:var(--primary)}.b-green{background:var(--gsoft);color:var(--green)}.b-orange{background:var(--osoft);color:var(--orange)}.b-purple{background:var(--pusoft);color:var(--purple)}.b-red{background:var(--rsoft);color:var(--red)}.b-cyan{background:var(--csoft);color:var(--cyan)}.b-gray{background:#eef1f7;color:var(--ink2)}
    .dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;background:var(--ink3)}.d-live{background:#36d39a;animation:pl 2s infinite}.d-g{background:var(--green)}.d-r{background:var(--red)}.d-o{background:var(--orange)}
    @keyframes pl{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(54,211,154,.55)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(54,211,154,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(54,211,154,0)}}
    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;height:38px;padding:0 16px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface);font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink2);transition:.15s}.btn:hover{background:var(--surface2);border-color:#d6deec}
    .btn-p{background:var(--primary2);border-color:var(--primary2);color:#fff}.btn-p:hover{background:#274fbf;color:#fff}.btn-sm{height:32px;padding:0 11px;font-size:12px}
    .tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}.tbl th{text-align:left;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ink3);font-weight:700;padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
    .tbl td{padding:13px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);vertical-align:middle}.tbl tr:hover td{background:var(--surface2)}.tbl .s{font-weight:600;color:var(--ink)}
    .tw{overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);background:var(--surface);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
    .bar{height:8px;border-radius:6px;background:#eef1f7;overflow:hidden}.bar>i{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:6px;background:var(--primary2)}
    .ring{--p:0;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;background:conic-gradient(var(--rg,var(--green)) calc(var(--p)*1%),#eef1f7 0);position:relative;flex:0 0 80px}.ring::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff}.ring b{position:relative;font-size:21px;font-weight:800}
    .split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 360px;gap:18px;align-items:start}@media(max-width:1180px){.split{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
    .opp{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:15px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;background:var(--surface);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;margin-bottom:12px}.opp:hover{border-color:#c9d4ea;box-shadow:var(--sh)}
    .opp .rail{width:4px;border-radius:4px;flex:0 0 4px}.opp .bd{flex:1;min-width:0}.opp .tt{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px}
    .opp .mt2{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px 14px;color:var(--ink2);font-size:12px;margin:6px 0}.opp .mt2 span{display:inline-flex;gap:5px;align-items:center}.opp .tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:9px}
    .abar{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-top:9px;padding-top:9px;border-top:1px dashed var(--line)}.ac{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;display:inline-flex;gap:5px;align-items:center;background:#f0f3fa;color:var(--ink2)}.ac .ok{color:var(--green)}.ac .wa{color:var(--orange)}.ac .ru{color:var(--primary2)}
    .side h4{font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--ink3);margin:16px 0 8px}
    .kv2{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);font-size:13px}.kv2 span:first-child{color:var(--ink2)}.kv2 span:last-child{font-weight:600;text-align:right}
    .tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);margin-bottom:18px;overflow-x:auto}.tab{padding:10px 15px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink2);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer}.tab:hover{color:var(--primary)}.tab.on{color:var(--primary);border-color:var(--primary2)}
    .filters{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}.fc{height:34px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;background:var(--surface);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink2);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer}.fc.on{border-color:var(--primary2);color:var(--primary);background:var(--psoft)}
    .tl{position:relative;padding-left:26px}.tl::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:9px;top:4px;bottom:4px;width:2px;background:var(--line)}
    .ti{position:relative;padding:0 0 18px}.ti::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-22px;top:2px;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;border:3px solid var(--primary2)}
    .ti.dn::before{border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green)}.ti.wn::before{border-color:var(--orange);background:var(--orange)}.ti.hm::before{border-color:var(--purple);background:var(--purple)}
    .ti .t{font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px}.ti .m{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink2);margin-top:2px}.ti .w{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3)}
    .agc{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:var(--surface);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);transition:.15s}.agc:hover{box-shadow:var(--sh);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .agc .tp{padding:16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2)}.aav{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:20px;color:#fff}
    .agc .bd{padding:16px}.agc .bd p{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink2);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px;min-height:54px}
    .mr{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}.met{flex:1;min-width:80px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:9px;padding:9px;text-align:center}.met b{display:block;font-size:16px}.met span{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--ink3)}
    .kan{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:14px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:8px}.kc{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;min-width:210px}
    .kc .h{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;padding:4px 6px 10px}.kc .h .ct{margin-left:auto;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;padding:0 8px;color:var(--ink2)}
    .kk{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:11px;margin-bottom:9px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);cursor:pointer}.kk:hover{box-shadow:var(--sh)}.kk .t{font-weight:600;font-size:12.5px;margin-bottom:6px}.kk .f{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3)}
    .mav{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--primary);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;display:grid;place-items:center}
    .board{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0e1a33,#0a1428);border-radius:18px;padding:22px;color:#dfe6f7}.flow{display:flex;align-items:stretch;overflow-x:auto;padding:6px 0}
    .node{flex:0 0 152px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:12px;position:relative}.node h5{font-size:12px;color:#fff;margin-bottom:6px}.node .st{font-size:10.5px;color:#8fa0c8}.node .q{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-top:6px}
    .arw{flex:0 0 30px;display:grid;place-items:center;color:#4f618c;font-size:20px}.node.act{border-color:#3f6bff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(63,107,255,.25)}.node.er{border-color:#e0556a}.node.hu{border-color:#9b6bff}
    .log{font-family:ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;font-size:11.5px;color:#aebbdc;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;max-height:380px;overflow:auto}.log div{padding:2px 0}.log .t{color:#5e6f9c}.log .ok{color:#4fd6a0}.log .wn{color:#f0b656}.log .hm{color:#b694ff}
    .brief{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;box-shadow:var(--sh);overflow:hidden}.brief .hd{background:linear-gradient(120deg,var(--primary),#27307a);color:#fff;padding:26px 30px}.brief .hd h2{font-size:21px;font-weight:800}.brief .hd p{color:#c7d2f7;margin-top:6px;font-size:13px}
    .brief .bd{padding:26px 30px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px}@media(max-width:880px){.brief .bd{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
    .brief .sec h4{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--primary);margin-bottom:8px}.brief .sec p,.brief .sec li{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink2);line-height:1.6}.brief .sec ul{padding-left:18px}
    .ai{border:1px solid #d9c8f5;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#faf7ff,#f1ecfc);padding:16px 18px}.ai .h{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--purple);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px}.ai p{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink2);line-height:1.55}
    .alert{display:flex;gap:11px;padding:12px;border-radius:11px;border:1px solid var(--line);margin-bottom:9px;align-items:flex-start}.alert .ic{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:9px;display:grid;place-items:center;flex:0 0 30px}.alert b{font-size:13px}.alert p{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink2)}
    .cki{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);font-size:13px}.ck-ok{color:var(--green)}.ck-no{color:var(--red)}
    .chart{position:relative;height:260px}.chart.sm{height:210px}
    @media(max-width:1100px){.sidebar{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;z-index:60;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:.25s}.sidebar.open{transform:none;box-shadow:var(--sh-lg)}.view{padding:18px}}
    @media(min-width:1101px){#mt{display:none}}</style><style id="kanFx">
    .kc{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
    .kc-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-height:30px}
    .kk{position:relative;cursor:grab}
    .kk.dragging{opacity:.45}
    .kc-hover{outline:2px dashed #2f5bd6;outline-offset:2px;border-radius:10px;background:#f4f7ff}
    .opp{cursor:pointer}
    .fc{cursor:pointer}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body><div class="shell">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="brand"><div class="mk">HO</div><div><b>Hub de Oportunidades</b><span>Inteligencia Institucional</span></div></div>
    <nav class="nav" id="nav"></nav>
    <div class="sbf"><div class="pulse"><span class="dot d-live"></span><div><b>Pipeline de IA ativo</b><span>8 agentes &middot; 1.284 itens/dia</span></div></div></div>
    </aside>
    <div class="main">
    <header class="topbar">
    <button class="ib" id="mt" onclick="document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open')">&#9776;</button>
    <div class="search"><span class="si">&#128269;</span><input placeholder="Buscar oportunidades, editais, instituicoes..."></div>
    <div class="tba"><button class="ib">&#9881;</button><button class="ib">&#128276;<span class="bdot">3</span></button>
    <div class="uc"><div class="av">MR</div><div><b>Marina Rocha</b><span>Gerente Institucional</span></div></div></div>
    </header>
    <main class="view" id="view"></main>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    const AG=[
    {id:'cap',n:'Agente de Captura',ic:'\u{1F50E}',c:'#2f5bd6',s:'#eaf0ff',ob:'Monitora fontes e identifica novas oportunidades publicas e institucionais.',e:'Portais, RSS, APIs de fomento, e-mails',sa:'Oportunidade bruta normalizada',rg:'Coleta a cada 15 min; deduplicacao por hash; confianca min 0.6',vol:1284,tm:'2,1 s',ac:97,hil:3},
    {id:'ext',n:'Agente de Extracao',ic:'\u{1F9FE}',c:'#0fa3b1',s:'#e0f6f8',ob:'Le o edital e extrai prazo, valor, geografia, requisitos e elegibilidade.',e:'Documento do edital (PDF, HTML)',sa:'Campos estruturados + requisitos',rg:'OCR quando necessario; validacao de datas; flag de ambiguidade',vol:1102,tm:'6,8 s',ac:94,hil:7},
    {id:'cls',n:'Agente de Classificacao',ic:'\u{1F3F7}',c:'#7c4dd0',s:'#f0e9fb',ob:'Atribui tema, categoria e taxonomia institucional a oportunidade.',e:'Texto + campos extraidos',sa:'Tema, categoria, tags',rg:'Taxonomia v3.2; multi-label; confianca min 0.7',vol:1080,tm:'1,4 s',ac:96,hil:2},
    {id:'eleg',n:'Agente de Elegibilidade',ic:'\u2705',c:'#13a36b',s:'#e3f7ee',ob:'Verifica requisitos minimos com base em regras institucionais.',e:'Requisitos + portfolio + criterios',sa:'Elegivel / parcial / nao elegivel',rg:'Checklist obrigatorio; CNPJ/porte; restricoes geograficas',vol:1044,tm:'2,9 s',ac:91,hil:12},
    {id:'ader',n:'Agente de Aderencia',ic:'\u{1F3AF}',c:'#1b3a8f',s:'#eaf0ff',ob:'Calcula score de aderencia estrategica ao portfolio institucional.',e:'Tema + elegibilidade + portfolio',sa:'Score 0-100 + justificativa',rg:'Pesos por criterio; benchmark historico; threshold 70',vol:1010,tm:'3,3 s',ac:93,hil:9},
    {id:'prio',n:'Agente de Priorizacao',ic:'\u{1F4C8}',c:'#e8801f',s:'#fdeede',ob:'Ranqueia oportunidades por aderencia, urgencia e valor potencial.',e:'Score + prazo + valor + capacidade',sa:'Prioridade alta/media/monitorar',rg:'Matriz aderencia x urgencia; capacidade de equipe',vol:842,tm:'1,1 s',ac:95,hil:5},
    {id:'brief',n:'Agente de Briefing',ic:'\u{1F4DD}',c:'#7c4dd0',s:'#f0e9fb',ob:'Gera o one-page executivo com recomendacao acionavel.',e:'Toda a analise consolidada',sa:'Briefing executivo + proximos passos',rg:'Template institucional; revisao humana p/ prio alta',vol:318,tm:'8,2 s',ac:92,hil:18},
    {id:'enc',n:'Agente de Encaminhamento',ic:'\u{1F4E4}',c:'#0fa3b1',s:'#e0f6f8',ob:'Distribui a oportunidade ao responsavel e abre o card no workflow.',e:'Decisao + responsavel sugerido',sa:'Tarefa no kanban + notificacao',rg:'Roteamento por tema/area; SLA por prioridade',vol:296,tm:'0,8 s',ac:99,hil:1}
    ];
    const PIPE=['cap','ext','cls','eleg','ader','prio','brief','enc'];
    function trail(r,p){return PIPE.map((id,i)=>{let st='wa';if(i<r)st='ok';else if(i===r)st=p?'wn':'ru';return{id,st};});}
    const OPS=[
    {id:'OP-2041',t:'Edital de Inovacao em Saude Digital - Fase II',ins:'Ministerio da Saude / FINEP',or:'Editais Publicos',te:'Saude / Tecnologia',pz:'04/07/2026',vl:'R$ 12,5 mi',rg:'Brasil',sc:88,ur:82,tags:[['Alta aderencia','b-green'],['Prazo critico','b-red'],['Estrategica','b-purple']],rs:'Programa de fomento a solucoes digitais para a atencao primaria, foco em interoperabilidade, prontuario eletronico e telemedicina.',re:6,p:false,rp:'Carlos Tavares'},
    {id:'OP-2027',t:'Edital FNDCT de Pesquisa Aplicada em IA',ins:'MCTI / FINEP',or:'Editais Publicos',te:'Tecnologia / IA',pz:'25/06/2026',vl:'R$ 9,3 mi',rg:'Brasil',sc:90,ur:91,tags:[['Alta aderencia','b-green'],['Prazo critico','b-red'],['Estrategica','b-purple']],rs:'Fomento a projetos de pesquisa aplicada em inteligencia artificial, ciencia de dados e modelos de linguagem.',re:5,p:false,rp:'Carlos Tavares'},
    {id:'OP-2039',t:'Programa Regional de Energia Limpa e Transicao Justa',ins:'Banco Interamericano (BID)',or:'Bancos de Fomento',te:'Energia / Sustentabilidade',pz:'15/08/2026',vl:'US$ 8,0 mi',rg:'America Latina',sc:81,ur:54,tags:[['Alta aderencia','b-green'],['Documentacao extensa','b-orange']],rs:'Cooperacao tecnica e financeira para geracao renovavel descentralizada em comunidades vulneraveis.',re:5,p:false,rp:'Marina Rocha'},
    {id:'OP-2029',t:'Chamada de Pesquisa em Seguranca Hidrica',ins:'Fundacao Rockefeller',or:'Cooperacao Internacional',te:'Recursos Hidricos',pz:'02/08/2026',vl:'US$ 2,1 mi',rg:'Global',sc:84,ur:71,tags:[['Alta aderencia','b-green'],['Estrategica','b-purple']],rs:'Grants para solucoes baseadas na natureza voltadas a seguranca hidrica e resiliencia climatica.',re:6,p:false,rp:'Marina Rocha'},
    {id:'OP-2035',t:'Fundo Multilateral para Cidades Resilientes',ins:'Banco Mundial',or:'Multilaterais',te:'Infraestrutura / Clima',pz:'30/09/2026',vl:'US$ 15,0 mi',rg:'Global',sc:79,ur:46,tags:[['Alta aderencia','b-green']],rs:'Financiamento para adaptacao climatica urbana e gestao de riscos de desastres.',re:5,p:false,rp:'Carlos Tavares'},
    {id:'OP-2037',t:'Chamada de Cooperacao em Bioeconomia Amazonica',ins:'Uniao Europeia - Horizon',or:'Cooperacao Internacional',te:'Meio Ambiente',pz:'28/06/2026',vl:'EUR 4,2 mi',rg:'Pan-Amazonia',sc:74,ur:88,tags:[['Prazo critico','b-red'],['Estrategica','b-purple']],rs:'Apoio a pesquisa aplicada e cadeias produtivas sustentaveis na regiao amazonica.',re:4,p:true,rp:'Equipe Tecnica'},
    {id:'OP-2033',t:'Edital de Capacitacao em Governo Digital',ins:'BNDES',or:'Bancos de Fomento',te:'Gov Tech / Educacao',pz:'20/07/2026',vl:'R$ 6,8 mi',rg:'Brasil',sc:67,ur:61,tags:[['Documentacao extensa','b-orange'],['Revisao humana','b-blue']],rs:'Formacao de servidores e modernizacao de servicos publicos digitais.',re:3,p:true,rp:'Aguardando'},
    {id:'OP-2031',t:'Programa de Inclusao Produtiva e Microcredito',ins:'CAF - Banco de Desenvolvimento',or:'Bancos de Fomento',te:'Desenvolvimento Social',pz:'12/10/2026',vl:'US$ 5,5 mi',rg:'America Latina',sc:58,ur:33,tags:[['Baixa aderencia','b-gray']],rs:'Linha de credito e assistencia tecnica para empreendedorismo de baixa renda.',re:4,p:false,rp:'-'}
    ];
    OPS.forEach(o=>o.tr=trail(o.re,o.p));
    const SRC=[['Portal de Compras Gov.br','Editais Publicos','ativa','ha 4 min',212,98],['FINEP - Chamadas Publicas','Editais Publicos','ativa','ha 11 min',64,96],['BID - Procurement Notices','Bancos de Fomento','ativa','ha 22 min',88,94],['Banco Mundial - Operations','Multilaterais','ativa','ha 33 min',51,92],['UE - Funding & Tenders','Cooperacao Internacional','falha','ha 3 h',37,71],['BNDES - Editais','Bancos de Fomento','ativa','ha 18 min',29,95],['CAF - Convocatorias','Bancos de Fomento','pendente','ha 1 h',14,83],['Fundacoes Internacionais','Cooperacao Internacional','ativa','ha 27 min',42,88]];
    const KAN={'Triagem':['OP-2037','OP-2033','OP-2031'],'Qualificacao':['OP-2039','OP-2035'],'Priorizacao':['OP-2027'],'Analise Tecnica':['OP-2029'],'Decisao':['OP-2041'],'Proposta':[]};
    const EV=[['14:02:11','ok','[Captura] OP-2041 identificada no Portal Gov.br (conf 0.97)'],['14:02:13','ok','[Extracao] OP-2041 prazo=04/07, valor=R$12,5mi, geo=BR'],['14:02:15','ok','[Classificacao] OP-2041 tema=Saude/Tecnologia'],['14:02:18','wn','[Elegibilidade] OP-2041 restricao parcial: porte da entidade'],['14:02:21','ok','[Aderencia] OP-2041 score=88/100'],['14:02:22','ok','[Priorizacao] OP-2041 => ALTA PRIORIDADE'],['14:02:24','hm','[Orquestrador] OP-2041 -> revisao humana (regra: prio alta)'],['14:05:02','wn','[Captura] Fonte UE-Funding falhou (timeout). Reagendado.'],['14:06:40','ok','[Briefing] OP-2029 one-pager gerado'],['14:08:55','hm','[Orquestrador] OP-2033 escalonada: confianca 0.62 < 0.70'],['14:11:09','ok','[Encaminhamento] OP-2029 atribuida a Marina Rocha'],['14:13:44','ok','[Captura] 6 novas oportunidades capturadas no ciclo']];
    const USERS=[['Marina Rocha','Gerente Institucional','marina.rocha@org.gov','Ativo'],['Carlos Tavares','Analista de Negocios','carlos.t@org.gov','Ativo'],['Helena Souza','Especialista Tecnico','helena.s@org.gov','Ativo'],['Rafael Lima','Lideranca Executiva','rafael.l@org.gov','Ativo'],['Admin Plataforma','Administrador','admin@org.gov','Ativo']];
    const agById=id=>AG.find(a=>a.id===id);
    /* opById redefinido abaixo (indexa OPS + DOU_OPS) */
    const E=s=>String(s==null?'':s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
    function ph(t,p,a){return `<div class="ph"><div><h1>${E(t)}</h1>${p?`<p>${E(p)}</p>`:''}</div><div class="sp"></div>${a||''}</div>`;}
    function kpi(o){return `<div class="kpi" style="--ac:${o.c};--so:${o.s}"><div class="ki">${o.ic}</div><div class="kv">${E(o.v)}</div><div class="kl">${E(o.l)}</div>${o.tr?`<div class="kt ${o.d||'up'}">${o.d==='down'?'\u25BC':'\u25B2'} ${E(o.tr)}</div>`:''}</div>`;}
    function bg(t,c){return `<span class="bg ${c||'b-gray'}">${E(t)}</span>`;}
    function scColor(s){return s>=80?'var(--green)':s>=65?'var(--orange)':'var(--red)';}
    function trailHtml(arr){return `<div class="abar">`+arr.map(t=>{const a=agById(t.id);const i=t.st==='ok'?'<span class="ok">\u25CF</span>':t.st==='ru'?'<span class="ru">\u25D0</span>':t.st==='wn'?'<span class="wa">\u26A0</span>':'<span style="color:#c2cbdd">\u25CB</span>';return `<span class="ac" title="${E(a.n)} - ${t.st}">${i}${a.ic}</span>`;}).join('')+`</div>`;}
    function oppCard(o){
    const inBoard=opInBoard(o.id);
    const openAttr=o.fonteDOU&&o.url?`onclick="if(event.target.closest('.opp-act'))return;window.open('${o.url}','_blank')"`:`onclick="if(event.target.closest('.opp-act'))return;go('op/${o.id}')"`;
    const statusBadge=inBoard?`<span class="bg b-green">\u2713 No Kanban</span>`:'';
    const actions=`<div class="opp-act" style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px">`+
    (inBoard
    ? `<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('pipeline')">\u2192 Ver no Kanban</button>`
    : `<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="approveOpp('${o.id}')">\u2713 Aprovar p/ Kanban</button>`)+
    `<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="discardOpp('${o.id}')">\u2715 Descartar</button>`+
    (o.fonteDOU&&o.url?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="window.open('${o.url}','_blank')">\u{1F517} Abrir no DOU</button>`:'')+
    `</div>`;
    return `<div class="opp" ${openAttr}><div class="rail" style="background:${scColor(o.sc)}"></div><div class="bd"><div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start"><div class="tt">${E(o.t)}</div><span class="bg b-blue" style="margin-left:auto">${o.id}</span>${statusBadge}</div><div class="mt2"><span>\u{1F3DB} ${E(o.ins)}</span><span>\u{1F4C5} ${E(o.pz)}</span><span>\u{1F4B0} ${E(o.vl)}</span><span>\u{1F30E} ${E(o.rg)}</span><span>\u2B50 ${o.sc}</span></div><div class="tags">${o.tags.map(t=>bg(t[0],t[1])).join('')}</div>${trailHtml(o.tr)}${actions}</div></div>`;
    }
    function tbl(cols,rows){return `<div class="tw"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr>${cols.map(c=>`<th>${E(c)}</th>`).join('')}</tr></thead><tbody>${rows.map(r=>`<tr>${r.map(c=>`<td>${c}</td>`).join('')}</tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;}
    function card(t,b,a){return `<div class="card"><div class="ch"><h3>${E(t)}</h3><div class="sp"></div>${a||''}</div><div class="cb">${b}</div></div>`;}
    function srcDot(s){return s==='ativa'?'<span class="dot d-g"></span>':s==='falha'?'<span class="dot d-r"></span>':'<span class="dot d-o"></span>';}
    let CHARTS=[];
    function clearCharts(){CHARTS.forEach(c=>{try{c.destroy()}catch(e){}});CHARTS=[];}
    const NAV=[{g:'Visao Geral'},{h:'dashboard',ic:'\u{1F4CA}',l:'Painel Executivo'},{h:'oportunidades',ic:'\u{1F4CB}',l:'Oportunidades',tag:'8'},{h:'pipeline',ic:'\u{1F500}',l:'Workflow / Kanban'},{g:'Inteligencia de IA'},{h:'agentes',ic:'\u{1F916}',l:'Agentes de IA',tag:'8'},{h:'orquestracao',ic:'\u2699',l:'Orquestracao'},{h:'fontes',ic:'\u{1F4E1}',l:'Fontes de Dados'},{g:'Gestao'},{h:'analytics',ic:'\u{1F4C8}',l:'Analytics'},{h:'config',ic:'\u{1F527}',l:'Configuracoes'},{g:'Tempo real'},{h:'dou',ic:'\u{1F50E}',l:'Busca DOU ao vivo',tag:'LIVE'}];
    function renderNav(active){document.getElementById('nav').innerHTML=NAV.map(it=>it.g?`<div class="grp">${E(it.g)}</div>`:`<a class="${active.split('/')[0]===it.h?'on':''}" onclick="go('${it.h}')"><span class="ic">${it.ic}</span>${E(it.l)}${it.tag?`<span class="tag">${it.tag}</span>`:''}</a>`).join('');}
    </script>
    <script>
    function pgDashboard(){
    const ops=liveOps();
    const douN=douOnly().length;
    const total=ops.length, alta=ops.filter(o=>o.sc>=80).length, criticas=ops.filter(o=>o.tags&&o.tags.some(t=>t[0]==='Prazo critico')).length;
    const noKanban=boardTotal();
    const k=`<div class="grid g4">
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F4E5}',v:fmtInt(total),l:'Oportunidades no hub',tr:douN+' do DOU',c:'#2f5bd6',s:'#eaf0ff'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F3AF}',v:noKanban,l:'Em fluxo no Kanban',tr:'workflow ativo',c:'#7c4dd0',s:'#f0e9fb'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u2B50',v:alta,l:'Alta aderencia (score 80+)',tr:'priorizar',c:'#13a36b',s:'#e3f7ee'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u23F0',v:criticas,l:'Com prazo critico',tr:'requer acao',d:'down',c:'#dc3a4b',s:'#fde6e8'})}</div>`;
    const top=[...ops].sort((a,b)=>b.sc-a.sc).slice(0,4).map(oppCard).join('')||'<div class="muted center" style="padding:24px">Sem oportunidades. Rode a <a onclick="go(\'dou\')" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">Busca DOU</a>.</div>';
    const stages=Object.keys(BOARD).map(c=>`<div class="node"><h5>${E(c)}</h5><div class="q">${boardCount(c)}</div></div>`).join('<div class="arw">\u2192</div>');
    const funnel=`<div class="board"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px"><span class="dot d-live"></span><b style="color:#fff">Fluxo de qualificacao &middot; Kanban</b><span style="margin-left:auto;color:#8fa0c8;font-size:12px">${noKanban} em fluxo</span></div><div class="flow">${stages}</div></div>`;
    const venc=[...ops].filter(o=>o.tags&&o.tags.some(t=>t[0]==='Prazo critico')).slice(0,3);
    const alertList=[];
    venc.forEach(o=>alertList.push(['#fde6e8','#dc3a4b','\u23F0',o.id+' - prazo critico',E(o.t)]));
    if(douN)alertList.push(['#e3f7ee','#13a36b','\u{1F50E}',douN+' oportunidade(s) do DOU',(noKanban?'':'Nenhuma ainda enviada ao Kanban. ')+'Revise no modulo Oportunidades.']);
    if(!alertList.length)alertList.push(['#f0e9fb','#7c4dd0','\u2728','Tudo em dia','Sem alertas criticos no momento.']);
    const al=alertList.map(a=>`<div class="alert"><div class="ic" style="background:${a[0]};color:${a[1]}">${a[2]}</div><div><b>${E(a[3])}</b><p>${E(a[4])}</p></div></div>`).join('');
    return ph('Painel Executivo','Visao consolidada das oportunidades reais captadas e em qualificacao no Kanban.',
    `<button class="btn" onclick="go('dou')">\u{1F50E} Busca DOU</button><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="go('oportunidades')">Ver oportunidades</button>`)
    +k+`<div class="mt">${funnel}</div>
    <div class="split mt"><div>${card('Top oportunidades por aderencia',top,`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('oportunidades')">Todas</button>`)}
    <div class="mt">${card('Captacao por origem',`<div class="chart"><canvas id="cTrend"></canvas></div>`)}</div></div>
    <div>${card('Alertas e acoes',al)}
    <div class="mt">${card('Distribuicao por origem',`<div class="chart sm"><canvas id="cOrig"></canvas></div>`)}</div></div></div>`;
    }
    function pgOportunidades(){
    const cats=['Todas','Editais Publicos','Bancos de Fomento','Cooperacao Internacional','Multilaterais','DOU Secao 1','DOU Secao 2','DOU Secao 3'];
    const douOps=(window.DOU_OPS||[]);
    const allOps=douOps.concat(OPS).filter(o=>!DISCARDED.has(o.id));
    const fc=cats.map((f,i)=>{const n=f==='Todas'?allOps.length:allOps.filter(o=>o.or===f).length;return `<div class="fc ${i===0?'on':''}" data-cat="${f}" onclick="filterOps(this,'${f}')">${f} <span style="opacity:.6">(${n})</span></div>`;}).join('');
    const rows=allOps.length?sortOps(allOps).map(o=>oppCard(o)).join(''):'<div class="muted center" style="padding:30px">Nenhuma oportunidade. Rode a <a onclick="go(\'dou\')" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">Busca DOU</a>.</div>';
    const douNote=douOps.length?`<div class="muted s" style="padding:8px 0">\u{1F50E} <b>${douOps.length}</b> oportunidade(s) capturada(s) do DOU. <a onclick="go('dou')" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">Atualizar \u2192</a></div>`:`<div class="muted s" style="padding:8px 0">\u{1F4A1} Rode a <a onclick="go('dou')" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">Busca DOU</a> para popular este modulo com editais reais.</div>`;
    const discNote=DISCARDED.size?`<span class="muted s" style="margin-left:auto">${DISCARDED.size} descartada(s) \u00b7 <a onclick="restoreDiscarded()" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">restaurar</a></span>`:'';
    const toolbar=`<div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin:6px 0 4px">
    <input id="oppSearch" oninput="applyOpp()" placeholder="\u{1F50D} Buscar por titulo, orgao, tema..." style="flex:1;min-width:200px;padding:10px 13px;border:1px solid #d9dee8;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px">
    <select id="oppSort" onchange="applyOpp()" style="padding:10px 11px;border:1px solid #d9dee8;border-radius:8px">
    <option value="sc">Ordenar: Score \u2193</option>
    <option value="ur">Urgencia \u2193</option>
    <option value="pz">Prazo</option>
    <option value="t">Titulo A-Z</option>
    </select>${discNote}</div>`;
    return ph('Oportunidades','Pipeline completo de oportunidades captadas, enriquecidas e priorizadas pelos agentes.',
    `<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="exportOps()">\u2191 Exportar</button><button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="go('dou')">+ Nova fonte</button>`)
    +douNote+toolbar+`<div class="filters">${fc}</div><div id="opsList">${rows}</div>`;
    }
    function sortOps(list){const by=(document.getElementById('oppSort')||{}).value||'sc';const a=[...list];
    if(by==='sc')a.sort((x,y)=>y.sc-x.sc);else if(by==='ur')a.sort((x,y)=>(y.ur||0)-(x.ur||0));
    else if(by==='t')a.sort((x,y)=>(''+x.t).localeCompare(''+y.t));else if(by==='pz')a.sort((x,y)=>(''+x.pz).localeCompare(''+y.pz));
    return a;}
    let OPP_CAT='Todas';
    function applyOpp(){
    const q=((document.getElementById('oppSearch')||{}).value||'').toLowerCase().trim();
    let base=(window.DOU_OPS||[]).concat(OPS).filter(o=>!DISCARDED.has(o.id));
    if(OPP_CAT!=='Todas')base=base.filter(o=>o.or===OPP_CAT);
    if(q)base=base.filter(o=>[o.t,o.ins,o.te,o.rg,o.id].some(v=>(''+(v||'')).toLowerCase().includes(q)));
    base=sortOps(base);
    const el=document.getElementById('opsList');
    el.innerHTML=base.length?base.map(oppCard).join(''):'<div class="muted center" style="padding:30px">Nenhuma oportunidade encontrada.</div>';
    }
    function exportOps(){
    const data=(window.DOU_OPS||[]).concat(OPS).filter(o=>!DISCARDED.has(o.id));
    const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
    const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download='oportunidades.json';a.click();
    }
    function pgOp(id){
    const o=opById(id); if(!o) return pgOportunidades();
    const ring=`<div style="display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center"><div class="ring" style="--p:${o.sc};--rg:${scColor(o.sc)}"><b>${o.sc}</b></div><div><div style="font-weight:700">Score de aderencia</div><div class="muted sm">Urgencia ${o.ur}/100 &middot; ${E(o.te)}</div><div style="margin-top:8px">${o.tags.map(t=>bg(t[0],t[1])).join(' ')}</div></div></div>`;
    const steps=o.tr.map(s=>{const a=agById(s.id);const st=s.st==='ok'?'dn':s.st==='wn'?'wn':s.st==='ru'?'hm':'';const txt=s.st==='ok'?'Concluido':s.st==='ru'?'Em processamento':s.st==='wn'?'Atencao / revisao':'Aguardando';return `<div class="ti ${st}"><div class="t">${a.ic} ${E(a.n)}</div><div class="m">${E(a.sa)}</div><div class="w">${txt} &middot; precisao ${a.ac}%</div></div>`;}).join('');
    const briefBd=`<div class="brief"><div class="hd"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><span class="bg" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff">${o.id}</span><span class="bg" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff">${E(o.or)}</span></div><h2 style="margin-top:10px">${E(o.t)}</h2><p>${E(o.ins)} &middot; ${E(o.rg)} &middot; prazo ${E(o.pz)} &middot; ${E(o.vl)}</p></div>
    <div class="bd"><div class="sec"><h4>Resumo</h4><p>${E(o.rs)}</p><h4 style="margin-top:16px">Recomendacao da IA</h4><div class="ai"><div class="h">\u2728 Sintese do Agente de Briefing</div><p>Aderencia ${o.sc>=80?'<b>alta</b>':'moderada'} ao portfolio institucional. ${o.sc>=80?'Recomenda-se avancar para preparacao de proposta com prioridade.':'Recomenda-se monitorar e reavaliar conforme capacidade da equipe.'} Responsavel sugerido: <b>${E(o.rp)}</b>.</p></div></div>
    <div class="sec"><h4>Proximos passos</h4><ul><li>Validar elegibilidade documental (porte e geografia).</li><li>Designar lider tecnico e montar consorcio se necessario.</li><li>Construir cronograma reverso a partir do prazo (${E(o.pz)}).</li><li>Aprovar go/no-go na reuniao de comite.</li></ul>
    <h4 style="margin-top:16px">Checklist de elegibilidade</h4>
    <div class="cki"><span class="ck-ok">\u2714</span> Natureza juridica compativel</div><div class="cki"><span class="ck-ok">\u2714</span> Area tematica aderente</div><div class="cki"><span class="${o.sc>=80?'ck-ok':'ck-no'}">${o.sc>=80?'\u2714':'\u2716'}</span> Porte da entidade ${o.sc>=80?'atende':'requer verificacao'}</div><div class="cki"><span class="ck-ok">\u2714</span> Restricao geografica satisfeita</div></div></div></div>`;
    const side=`<div class="side">${card('Pipeline de processamento',`<div class="tl">${steps}</div>`)}
    <div class="mt">${card('Dados estruturados (extraidos)',`<div class="kv2"><span>Origem</span><span>${E(o.or)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Instituicao</span><span>${E(o.ins)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Tema</span><span>${E(o.te)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Geografia</span><span>${E(o.rg)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Valor</span><span>${E(o.vl)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Prazo</span><span>${E(o.pz)}</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Responsavel</span><span>${E(o.rp)}</span></div>`)}</div></div>`;
    return ph('Detalhe da oportunidade','',`<button class="btn" onclick="go('oportunidades')">\u2190 Voltar</button><button class="btn btn-p">\u2713 Aprovar para proposta</button>`)
    +card('Aderencia estrategica',ring)+`<div class="split mt"><div>${briefBd}</div>${side}</div>`;
    }
    function pgPipeline(){
    const cols=Object.keys(BOARD).map(col=>{
    const items=(BOARD[col]||[]).map(id=>{const o=opById(id);if(!o)return '';
    const ini=(o.rp&&o.rp!=='-')?o.rp.split(' ').map(x=>x[0]).join('').slice(0,2):'\u2022';
    return `<div class="kk" draggable="true" data-id="${o.id}" ondragstart="kanDragStart(event,'${o.id}')" ondragend="kanDragEnd(event)" onclick="if(!event.target.closest('.kk-x'))go('op/${o.id}')">
    <div class="kk-x" title="Remover" onclick="event.stopPropagation();kanRemove('${o.id}')" style="position:absolute;top:6px;right:8px;cursor:pointer;color:#aab;font-size:13px">\u2715</div>
    <div class="t">${E(o.t)}</div>
    <div>${bg(o.id,'b-blue')} ${bg((''+(o.te||o.or)).split(' / ')[0],'b-gray')}</div>
    <div class="f"><span class="mav">${ini}</span><span>${E(o.rp||'-')}</span><span style="margin-left:auto">\u2B50 ${o.sc}</span></div></div>`;}).join('')
    ||`<div class="muted sm center kan-empty" style="padding:14px">Arraste oportunidades aqui</div>`;
    return `<div class="kc" ondragover="kanOver(event)" ondragleave="kanLeave(event)" ondrop="kanDrop(event,'${col}')" data-col="${col}"><div class="h">${E(col)}<span class="ct">${(BOARD[col]||[]).length}</span></div><div class="kc-body">${items}</div></div>`;}).join('');
    return ph('Workflow / Kanban','Arraste as oportunidades entre as etapas de qualificacao ate a proposta. Os agentes alimentam a Triagem automaticamente; o estado fica salvo neste navegador.',
    `<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="resetBoard()">\u21BA Restaurar fluxo</button>`)
    +`<div class="kan">${cols}</div>`;
    }
    let KAN_DRAG=null;
    function kanDragStart(e,id){KAN_DRAG=id;e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';try{e.target.classList.add('dragging')}catch(_){}}
    function kanDragEnd(e){try{e.target.classList.remove('dragging')}catch(_){}}
    function kanOver(e){e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.add('kc-hover');}
    function kanLeave(e){e.currentTarget.classList.remove('kc-hover');}
    function kanDrop(e,col){e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('kc-hover');if(!KAN_DRAG)return;
    Object.keys(BOARD).forEach(c=>{BOARD[c]=BOARD[c].filter(x=>x!==KAN_DRAG)});
    BOARD[col]=BOARD[col]||[];BOARD[col].unshift(KAN_DRAG);KAN_DRAG=null;saveKan();render('pipeline');}
    function kanRemove(id){Object.keys(BOARD).forEach(c=>{BOARD[c]=BOARD[c].filter(x=>x!==id)});saveKan();toast('Removido do Kanban');render('pipeline');}
    function resetBoard(){BOARD=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(KAN));saveKan();toast('Fluxo restaurado ao padrao');render('pipeline');}
    function pgAgentes(){
    const cards=AG.map(a=>`<div class="agc"><div class="tp"><div class="aav" style="background:${a.c}">${a.ic}</div><div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px">${E(a.n)}</div><div class="muted sm">precisao ${a.ac}% &middot; ${a.tm}/item</div></div><span class="bg b-green" style="margin-left:auto"><span class="dot d-live"></span>ativo</span></div>
    <div class="bd"><p>${E(a.ob)}</p><div class="mr"><div class="met"><b>${a.vol}</b><span>processados</span></div><div class="met"><b>${a.ac}%</b><span>precisao</span></div><div class="met"><b>${a.hil}</b><span>revisao humana</span></div></div>
    <div class="mt"><div class="muted sm"><b>Entrada:</b> ${E(a.e)}</div><div class="muted sm" style="margin-top:4px"><b>Saida:</b> ${E(a.sa)}</div><div class="muted sm" style="margin-top:4px"><b>Regras:</b> ${E(a.rg)}</div></div></div></div>`).join('');
    return ph('Agentes de IA','Oito agentes especializados que cooperam de forma orquestrada para captar, enriquecer, priorizar e encaminhar cada oportunidade.',
    `<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="go('orquestracao')">Ver orquestracao</button>`)
    +`<div class="grid g4">${cards}</div>`;
    }
    function pgOrquestracao(){
    const nodes=PIPE.map((id,i)=>{const a=agById(id);const cls=i===5?'act':i===3?'hu':'';return `<div class="node ${cls}"><h5>${a.ic} ${E(a.n.replace('Agente de ',''))}</h5><div class="st">${cls==='act'?'processando...':cls==='hu'?'\u{1F464} revisao humana':'ok'}</div><div class="q">${a.vol}</div></div>`+(i<PIPE.length-1?`<div class="arw">\u2192</div>`:'');}).join('');
    const douN=douOnly().length, kb=boardTotal();
    const board=`<div class="board"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px"><span class="dot d-live"></span><b style="color:#fff">Orquestrador central</b><span class="bg" style="margin-left:auto;background:rgba(63,107,255,.25);color:#bcd">${DOU_STATS?('ultima captura DOU '+E(DOU_STATS.hora||'')):'aguardando captura'}</span></div><div class="flow">${nodes}</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:18px">
    <div><div class="muted sm">Oportunidades do DOU</div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#fff">${fmtInt(douN)}</div></div>
    <div><div class="muted sm">Em fluxo no Kanban</div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#fff">${fmtInt(kb)}</div></div>
    <div><div class="muted sm">Eventos registrados</div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#fff">${fmtInt(ACTIVITY.length)}</div></div>
    <div><div class="muted sm">Materias varridas</div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#fff">${DOU_STATS?fmtInt(DOU_STATS.materias):'-'}</div></div></div></div>`;
    const liveLog = ACTIVITY.length ? ACTIVITY : EV;
    const isLive = ACTIVITY.length>0;
    const logs=`<div class="log">`+liveLog.map(e=>`<div><span class="t">${E(e[0])}</span> <span class="${e[1]}">${E(e[2])}</span></div>`).join('')+`</div>`;
    const logActions = `<span class="bg ${isLive?'b-green':'b-gray'}"><span class="dot ${isLive?'d-live':''}"></span>${isLive?'tempo real':'exemplo'}</span>`+(isLive?` <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="clearActivity()" style="margin-left:8px">Limpar</button>`:'');
    const rules=[['Confianca minima por etapa','0.70 classif. / 0.60 captura'],['Escalonar a humano se','score limitrofe ou requisito ambiguo'],['Revisao obrigatoria','toda oportunidade ALTA'],['Deduplicacao','url + titulo da materia (DOU)'],['Reprocessamento','automatico em falha (ate 3x)']].map(r=>`<div class="kv2"><span>${E(r[0])}</span><span>${E(r[1])}</span></div>`).join('');
    return ph('Orquestracao','O orquestrador coordena os agentes e registra cada acao real do hub: capturas no DOU, aprovacoes e descartes no Kanban.')
    +board+`<div class="split mt"><div>${card('Log de eventos do orquestrador',logs,logActions)}</div>
    <div>${card('Politicas de decisao',rules)}<div class="mt">${card('Saude dos agentes',`<div class="chart sm"><canvas id="cAcc"></canvas></div>`)}</div></div></div>`;
    }
    function clearActivity(){ACTIVITY=[];try{localStorage.removeItem(ACT_KEY)}catch(_){}render('orquestracao');}
    function pgFontes(){
    /* Fonte DOU dinamica (alimentada pela Busca DOU real) */
    const douRow = DOU_STATS
    ? [`<span class="s">Diario Oficial da Uniao &middot; ${E(DOU_STATS.secao||'DOU')}</span>`,bg('Editais Publicos','b-blue'),`<span class="dot d-g"></span> ativa`,`<span class="muted">${E(DOU_STATS.hora||'agora')}</span>`,`<b>${DOU_STATS.materias||0}</b>`,`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><div class="bar" style="width:70px"><i style="width:96%;background:var(--green)"></i></div><span class="sm">real</span></div>`,`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('dou')">Abrir busca</button>`]
    : [`<span class="s">Diario Oficial da Uniao</span>`,bg('Editais Publicos','b-blue'),`<span class="dot d-o"></span> aguardando`,`<span class="muted">-</span>`,`<b>0</b>`,`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><div class="bar" style="width:70px"><i style="width:0%;background:var(--orange)"></i></div><span class="sm">-</span></div>`,`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-p" onclick="go('dou')">Configurar</button>`];
    const rows=[douRow].concat(SRC.map(s=>[`<span class="s">${E(s[0])}</span>`,bg(s[1],'b-blue'),`${srcDot(s[2])} ${E(s[2])}`,`<span class="muted">${E(s[3])}</span>`,`<b>${s[4]}</b>`,`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><div class="bar" style="width:70px"><i style="width:${s[5]}%;background:${s[5]>=90?'var(--green)':s[5]>=80?'var(--orange)':'var(--red)'}"></i></div><span class="sm">${s[5]}%</span></div>`,`<button class="btn btn-sm">Configurar</button>`]));
    const totalFontes=SRC.length+1;
    const ativas=SRC.filter(s=>s[2]==='ativa').length+(DOU_STATS?1:0);
    const captadasHoje=(DOU_STATS?DOU_STATS.materias:0)+SRC.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r[4]||0),0);
    const k=`<div class="grid g4">
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F4E1}',v:totalFontes,l:'Fontes conectadas',c:'#2f5bd6',s:'#eaf0ff'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u2705',v:ativas,l:'Fontes ativas',c:'#13a36b',s:'#e3f7ee'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u26A0',v:SRC.filter(s=>s[2]!=='ativa').length+(DOU_STATS?0:1),l:'Requerem atencao',c:'#e8801f',s:'#fdeede'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F4C4}',v:fmtInt(captadasHoje),l:'Itens varridos (DOU + fontes)',c:'#7c4dd0',s:'#f0e9fb'})}</div>`;
    const douNote = DOU_STATS
    ? `<div class="muted s mt">\u{1F50E} DOU: ultima varredura em <b>${E(DOU_STATS.data||'')}</b> &middot; ${DOU_STATS.materias} materias &middot; ${DOU_STATS.termosOk}/${DOU_STATS.termos} termos com ocorrencia &middot; ${DOU_STATS.novas} oportunidade(s) gerada(s).</div>`
    : `<div class="muted s mt">\u{1F50E} DOU ainda nao varrido nesta sessao. Use o modulo <a onclick="go('dou')" style="cursor:pointer;color:#2f5bd6">Busca DOU</a> para coletar editais reais.</div>`;
    return ph('Fontes de Dados','Portais e APIs monitorados pelo Agente de Captura. A fonte DOU reflete a sua ultima busca real.',
    `<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="go('dou')">\u{1F50E} Ir para Busca DOU</button>`)
    +k+`<div class="mt">${tbl(['Fonte','Categoria','Status','Ultima coleta','Itens','Confiabilidade',''],rows)}</div>`+douNote;
    }
    function pgAnalytics(){
    const ops=liveOps();
    const total=ops.length;
    const aderPct=total?Math.round(ops.filter(o=>o.sc>=80).length/total*100):0;
    const douN=douOnly().length;
    const k=`<div class="grid g4">
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F4C8}',v:fmtInt(total),l:'Oportunidades no hub',tr:douN+' do DOU',c:'#2f5bd6',s:'#eaf0ff'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F3AF}',v:aderPct+'%',l:'Taxa de aderencia (80+)',tr:ops.filter(o=>o.sc>=80).length+' itens',c:'#13a36b',s:'#e3f7ee'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u{1F500}',v:boardTotal(),l:'Em fluxo no Kanban',tr:'qualificacao',c:'#7c4dd0',s:'#f0e9fb'})}
    ${kpi({ic:'\u2705',v:boardCount('Proposta'),l:'Em proposta',tr:'estagio final',c:'#e8801f',s:'#fdeede'})}</div>`;
    return ph('Analytics','Indicadores calculados a partir das oportunidades reais e do fluxo no Kanban.')
    +k+`<div class="grid g2 mt"><div>${card('Oportunidades por origem',`<div class="chart"><canvas id="aOrig"></canvas></div>`)}</div>
    <div>${card('Distribuicao de score',`<div class="chart"><canvas id="aScore"></canvas></div>`)}</div></div>
    <div class="grid g2 mt"><div>${card('Funil de qualificacao (Kanban)',`<div class="chart"><canvas id="aFun"></canvas></div>`)}</div>
    <div>${card('Precisao por agente',`<div class="chart"><canvas id="aAcc"></canvas></div>`)}</div></div>`;
    }
    function pgConfig(){
    const rows=USERS.map(u=>[`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><span class="av" style="width:32px;height:32px;font-size:11px">${u[0].split(' ').map(x=>x[0]).join('').slice(0,2)}</span><span class="s">${E(u[0])}</span></div>`,E(u[1]),`<span class="muted">${E(u[2])}</span>`,bg(u[3],'b-green'),`<button class="btn btn-sm">Editar</button>`]);
    return ph('Configuracoes','Parametros do hub, regras dos agentes e gestao de acessos.')
    +`<div class="split"><div>${card('Equipe e permissoes',tbl(['Usuario','Perfil','E-mail','Status',''],rows),`<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm">+ Convidar</button>`)}
    <div class="mt">${card('Parametros do pipeline de IA',`<div class="kv2"><span>Frequencia de captura</span><span>A cada 15 minutos</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Threshold de aderencia</span><span>70 / 100</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Confianca minima global</span><span>0,70</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Human-in-the-loop</span><span>Ativado (prio. alta)</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Taxonomia</span><span>Institucional v3.2</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Idiomas suportados</span><span>PT / EN / ES</span></div>`)}</div></div>
    <div class="side"><h4>Notificacoes</h4>${card('Canais',`<div class="kv2"><span>E-mail (prazos criticos)</span><span>Ativo</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Resumo diario</span><span>09:00</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Slack / Teams</span><span>Conectado</span></div><div class="kv2"><span>Alertas de falha de fonte</span><span>Ativo</span></div>`)}
    <div class="mt">${card('Sobre',`<p class="muted sm">Hub de Oportunidades Institucionais &middot; v1.0<br>Pipeline de 8 agentes de IA orquestrados.<br>Dados ilustrativos para demonstracao.</p>`)}</div></div></div>`;
    }
    function mkCharts(route){
    if(typeof Chart==='undefined')return;
    Chart.defaults.font.family='Inter';Chart.defaults.color='#8a96ac';Chart.defaults.font.size=11.5;
    const grid={grid:{color:'#eef1f7'},border:{display:false}};const ng={grid:{display:false},border:{display:false}};
    const PAL=['#2f5bd6','#13a36b','#7c4dd0','#e8801f','#0fa3b1','#1b3a8f','#dc3a4b','#8ab0f6'];
    const mk=(id,cfg)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)CHARTS.push(new Chart(el,cfg));};
    const origData=()=>{const m=originCounts();const labels=Object.keys(m);return {labels,values:labels.map(l=>m[l])};};
    if(route==='dashboard'){
    const od=origData();
    mk('cTrend',{type:'bar',data:{labels:od.labels,datasets:[{label:'Oportunidades',data:od.values,backgroundColor:'#2f5bd6',borderRadius:6}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:grid,x:ng}}});
    mk('cOrig',{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:od.labels,datasets:[{data:od.values,backgroundColor:PAL,borderWidth:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'62%',plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom'}}}});
    }
    if(route==='orquestracao'){
    mk('cAcc',{type:'bar',data:{labels:AG.map(a=>a.n.replace('Agente de ','')),datasets:[{data:AG.map(a=>a.ac),backgroundColor:'#2f5bd6',borderRadius:6}]},options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{...grid,min:80,max:100},y:ng}}});
    }
    if(route==='analytics'){
    const ops=liveOps();const od=origData();
    mk('aOrig',{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:od.labels,datasets:[{data:od.values,backgroundColor:PAL,borderWidth:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'58%',plugins:{legend:{position:'right'}}}});
    const buckets=[0,0,0,0];ops.forEach(o=>{const s=o.sc||0;if(s<50)buckets[0]++;else if(s<70)buckets[1]++;else if(s<85)buckets[2]++;else buckets[3]++;});
    mk('aScore',{type:'bar',data:{labels:['<50','50-69','70-84','85+'],datasets:[{data:buckets,backgroundColor:['#cfe0ff','#8ab0f6','#4f7fe8','#2f5bd6'],borderRadius:6}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:grid,x:ng}}});
    const cols=Object.keys(BOARD);
    mk('aFun',{type:'bar',data:{labels:cols,datasets:[{data:cols.map(c=>boardCount(c)),backgroundColor:['#cfe0ff','#a9c5fb','#8ab0f6','#6f9bf0','#4f7fe8','#2f5bd6'],borderRadius:6}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:grid,x:ng}}});
    mk('aAcc',{type:'bar',data:{labels:AG.map(a=>a.n.replace('Agente de ','')),datasets:[{data:AG.map(a=>a.ac),backgroundColor:'#7c4dd0',borderRadius:6}]},options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{...grid,min:80,max:100},y:ng}}});
    }
    }
    function render(route){
    clearCharts();
    const seg=route.split('/'); let html='';
    switch(seg[0]){
    case 'dashboard':html=pgDashboard();break;
    case 'oportunidades':html=pgOportunidades();break;
    case 'op':html=pgOp(seg[1]);break;
    case 'pipeline':html=pgPipeline();break;
    case 'agentes':html=pgAgentes();break;
    case 'orquestracao':html=pgOrquestracao();break;
    case 'fontes':html=pgFontes();break;
    case 'analytics':html=pgAnalytics();break;
    case 'config':html=pgConfig();break;
    case 'dou':html=pgDOU();break;
    default:html=pgDashboard();route='dashboard';
    }
    document.getElementById('view').innerHTML=html;
    renderNav(route);
    document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
    window.scrollTo(0,0);
    setTimeout(()=>mkCharts(seg[0]),30);
    if(seg[0]==='dou')setTimeout(initDOU,40);
    }
    /* ===== Busca DOU ao vivo -> popula modulo Oportunidades ===== */
    const DOU_KW_KEY='hubuzz.dou.keywords', DOU_SECAO_KEY='hubuzz.dou.secao';
    const DOU_OPS_KEY='hubuzz.dou.ops', KAN_KEY='hubuzz.kanban', OPP_DISCARD_KEY='hubuzz.opp.discarded';
    function loadDouOps(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(DOU_OPS_KEY)||'[]')||[]}catch(_){return[]}}
    function saveDouOps(){try{localStorage.setItem(DOU_OPS_KEY,JSON.stringify(window.DOU_OPS||[]))}catch(_){}}
    window.DOU_OPS=loadDouOps();
    /* Kanban persistente: parte do KAN padrao e sobrepoe o que estiver salvo */
    function loadKan(){try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KAN_KEY)||'null');if(s&&typeof s==='object'){Object.keys(KAN).forEach(k=>{if(!s[k])s[k]=[]});return s;}}catch(_){}return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(KAN));}
    function saveKan(){try{localStorage.setItem(KAN_KEY,JSON.stringify(BOARD))}catch(_){}}
    let BOARD=loadKan();
    function loadDiscarded(){try{return new Set(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(OPP_DISCARD_KEY)||'[]'))}catch(_){return new Set()}}
    function saveDiscarded(){try{localStorage.setItem(OPP_DISCARD_KEY,JSON.stringify([...DISCARDED]))}catch(_){}}
    let DISCARDED=loadDiscarded();
    /* ===== Log de atividade + estatisticas de fontes (persistentes) ===== */
    const ACT_KEY='hubuzz.activity', DOUSTATS_KEY='hubuzz.dou.stats';
    function loadAct(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ACT_KEY)||'[]')||[]}catch(_){return[]}}
    let ACTIVITY=loadAct();
    function nowHM(){const d=new Date();return d.toTimeString().slice(0,8);}
    function logEvent(kind,msg){/* kind: ok|wn|hm */ ACTIVITY.unshift([nowHM(),kind,msg]);ACTIVITY=ACTIVITY.slice(0,60);try{localStorage.setItem(ACT_KEY,JSON.stringify(ACTIVITY))}catch(_){}}
    function loadDouStats(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(DOUSTATS_KEY)||'null')||null}catch(_){return null}}
    let DOU_STATS=loadDouStats();
    function saveDouStats(s){DOU_STATS=s;try{localStorage.setItem(DOUSTATS_KEY,JSON.stringify(s))}catch(_){}}
    /* indice unico de oportunidades por id (DOU ao vivo + mock OPS) */
    function allOpsIndex(){const map={};OPS.forEach(o=>map[o.id]=o);(window.DOU_OPS||[]).forEach(o=>map[o.id]=o);return map;}
    function opById(id){return allOpsIndex()[id]||null;}
    function opInBoard(id){return Object.values(BOARD).some(arr=>arr.includes(id));}
    /* ===== Metricas vivas: combina mock + DOU - descartados ===== */
    function liveOps(){return OPS.concat(window.DOU_OPS||[]).filter(o=>!DISCARDED.has(o.id));}
    function douOnly(){return (window.DOU_OPS||[]).filter(o=>!DISCARDED.has(o.id));}
    function boardCount(col){return (BOARD[col]||[]).length;}
    function boardTotal(){return Object.values(BOARD).reduce((s,a)=>s+a.length,0);}
    function originCounts(){const m={};liveOps().forEach(o=>{const k=o.or||'Outros';m[k]=(m[k]||0)+1});return m;}
    function fmtInt(n){return (n||0).toLocaleString('pt-BR');}
    function approveOpp(id){if(opInBoard(id))return;BOARD['Triagem']=BOARD['Triagem']||[];BOARD['Triagem'].unshift(id);saveKan();logEvent('ok','[Qualificacao] '+id+' aprovada -> Triagem no Kanban');toast('Oportunidade enviada para Triagem no Kanban');render(location.hash.replace('#','')||'oportunidades');}
    function discardOpp(id){DISCARDED.add(id);saveDiscarded();Object.keys(BOARD).forEach(c=>{BOARD[c]=BOARD[c].filter(x=>x!==id)});saveKan();logEvent('wn','[Triagem] '+id+' descartada pelo analista');toast('Oportunidade descartada');render('oportunidades');}
    function restoreDiscarded(){DISCARDED=new Set();saveDiscarded();toast('Descartes restaurados');render('oportunidades');}
    function toast(msg){try{if(typeof document==='undefined'||!document.body)return;let t=document.getElementById('hbToast');if(!t){t=document.createElement('div');t.id='hbToast';t.style.cssText='position:fixed;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#16223a;color:#fff;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.25);opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s';document.body.appendChild(t);}t.textContent=msg;t.style.opacity='1';clearTimeout(window._htmt);window._htmt=setTimeout(()=>t.style.opacity='0',2200);}catch(_){}}
    function getKw(){return localStorage.getItem(DOU_KW_KEY)||'fomento, inovacao, saude, energia';}
    function getSecao(){return localStorage.getItem(DOU_SECAO_KEY)||'do3';}
    function pgDOU(){
    const kw=getKw(), sec=getSecao();
    const form=`<div style="display:block">
    <div class="muted s" style="margin-bottom:8px">As palavras-chave alimentam o <b>modulo Oportunidades</b>. A busca varre <b>todas</b> as materias da secao no dia (DOU real).</div>
    <input id="douKw" value="${kw.replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}" placeholder="ex.: fomento, saude" style="width:100%;padding:11px 13px;border:1px solid #d9dee8;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px;align-items:center">
    <select id="douSec" style="padding:9px 11px;border:1px solid #d9dee8;border-radius:8px">
    <option value="do1"${sec==='do1'?' selected':''}>Secao 1 - Atos normativos</option>
    <option value="do2"${sec==='do2'?' selected':''}>Secao 2 - Pessoal</option>
    <option value="do3"${sec==='do3'?' selected':''}>Secao 3 - Contratos e editais</option>
    </select>
    <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="runDOU()">&#128269; Buscar agora</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="saveKw()">&#128190; Salvar</button>
    <span id="douSaved" class="s" style="color:#13a36b"></span>
    </div></div>`;
    return ph('Busca DOU ao vivo','Consulta real ao DOU. Editais encontrados viram oportunidades no modulo Oportunidades.')
    + card('Parametros da busca',form)
    + `<div class="mt" id="douResults"><div class="muted center" style="padding:30px">Defina as palavras-chave e clique em <b>Buscar agora</b>.</div></div>`;
    }
    function initDOU(){const i=document.getElementById('douKw');if(i)i.value=getKw();}
    function saveKw(){localStorage.setItem(DOU_KW_KEY,document.getElementById('douKw').value.trim());localStorage.setItem(DOU_SECAO_KEY,document.getElementById('douSec').value);const s=document.getElementById('douSaved');if(s){s.textContent='\u2714 salvo';setTimeout(()=>s.textContent='',2000);}}
    const SEC_LABEL={do1:'DOU Secao 1',do2:'DOU Secao 2',do3:'DOU Secao 3'};
    async function runDOU(){
    saveKw();
    const box=document.getElementById('douResults');
    const kws=document.getElementById('douKw').value.split(',').map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const sec=document.getElementById('douSec').value;
    if(!kws.length){box.innerHTML='<div class="muted center" style="padding:24px">Informe ao menos uma palavra-chave.</div>';return;}
    box.innerHTML='<div class="muted center" style="padding:30px">&#9203; Varrendo o DOU (alguns segundos)...</div>';
    try{
    const r=await fetch('/api/dou/buscar',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({keywords:kws,secao:sec})});
    const raw=await r.text();let data;
    try{data=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_){logEvent('hm','[Captura] Backend indisponivel ao consultar o DOU');box.innerHTML='<div class="muted center" style="padding:24px;color:#d33"><b>Backend indisponivel.</b><br>Abra pela URL do Render.</div>';return;}
    if(!data.ok){logEvent('hm','[Captura] DOU retornou erro: '+(data.error||'desconhecido'));box.innerHTML='<div class="muted center" style="padding:24px;color:#d33">'+(data.error||'Erro')+'</div>';return;}
    const novasOps=[];
    data.resultados.forEach(res=>{(res.materias||[]).forEach((m,idx)=>{novasOps.push({
    id:'DOU-'+res.termo.slice(0,3).toUpperCase()+'-'+idx,t:m.titulo,ins:m.orgao||'Diario Oficial da Uniao',
    or:SEC_LABEL[data.consulta.secao]||'DOU',te:res.termo,pz:data.consulta.data,vl:'-',rg:'Brasil',
    sc:70,ur:50,tags:[['DOU '+res.termo,'b-blue'],['Capturado ao vivo','b-green']],
    rs:(m.resumo||m.titulo),re:1,p:false,rp:'Agente de Captura',tr:[],url:m.url,fonteDOU:true});});});
    // mescla com as ja capturadas, deduplicando por (titulo|url|termo)
    const existing=window.DOU_OPS||[];
    const seen=new Set(existing.map(o=>(o.url||'')+'|'+(o.t||'')));
    let seq=existing.length;
    novasOps.forEach(o=>{const k=(o.url||'')+'|'+(o.t||'');if(seen.has(k))return;seen.add(k);o.id='DOU-'+(++seq).toString().padStart(4,'0');existing.push(o);});
    window.DOU_OPS=existing;
    saveDouOps();
    /* registra estatisticas da fonte DOU e eventos do orquestrador */
    const okTermos=data.resultados.filter(x=>x.ocorrencias>0).length;
    saveDouStats({secao:SEC_LABEL[data.consulta.secao]||'DOU',secaoCod:data.consulta.secao,data:data.consulta.data,
    materias:data.consulta.total_materias,termos:data.resultados.length,termosOk:okTermos,
    novas:total,ts:Date.now(),hora:nowHM()});
    logEvent('ok','[Captura] DOU '+(data.consulta.secao||'').toUpperCase()+' varrido: '+data.consulta.total_materias+' materias, '+kws.length+' termos');
    if(total)logEvent('ok','[Captura] '+total+' nova(s) oportunidade(s) capturada(s) do DOU');
    else logEvent('wn','[Captura] Nenhuma ocorrencia nova no DOU para os termos atuais');
    const cards=data.resultados.map(res=>{
    const n=res.ocorrencias;
    const lis=(res.materias||[]).slice(0,5).map(m=>`<div class="cki"><span class="ck-ok">\u2714</span> <a href="${m.url}" target="_blank" style="color:#2f5bd6">${E(m.titulo)}</a></div>`).join('')||'<div class="muted s">Sem ocorrencias na data.</div>';
    return `<div class="op" style="border-left:4px solid ${n?'#13a36b':'#9aa3b2'};padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;border:1px solid #eef0f5;border-radius:10px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:10px"><b>${E(res.termo)}</b><span class="s" style="color:${n?'#13a36b':'#9aa3b2'}">${n} ocorrencia(s)</span></div><div class="mt">${lis}</div></div>`;}).join('');
    const total=novasOps.length;
    const btn=total?`<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm mt" onclick="go('oportunidades')">\u2192 Ver ${total} no modulo Oportunidades</button>`:'';
    box.innerHTML=card(`Resultados &middot; ${data.consulta.data} &middot; ${data.consulta.total_materias} materias varridas`,cards+btn+`<div class="muted s mt">${E(data.nota||'')}</div>`);
    }catch(e){logEvent('hm','[Captura] Falha de rede na busca DOU');box.innerHTML='<div class="muted center" style="padding:24px;color:#d33">Erro de rede: '+e+'</div>';}
    }
    function go(route){location.hash=route;}
    function filterOps(el,cat){
    document.querySelectorAll('.filters .fc').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');
    OPP_CAT=cat;applyOpp();
    }
    window.addEventListener('hashchange',()=>render(location.hash.replace('#','')||'dashboard'));
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>render(location.hash.replace('#','')||'dashboard'));
    </script>
    </body></html>

    Footer
